---
title: "Past Boards"
page-layout: article
---

::: {.past-boards-page}

::: {.past-boards-intro}
RC42 Social Psychology was first established as a Working Group in 1986 and was recognized as an ISA Research Committee in 1988. This page presents the historical boards of RC42 since its recognition.

<span class="past-boards-source">Source: International Sociological Association, RC42 Social Psychology Past Boards.</span>
:::

::: {.past-boards-layout}

::: {.past-boards-main}

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-2018-2022" open>
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 2018–2022, extended to 2023</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
President
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Alison BIANCHI, Iowa University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary-Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Alison BIANCHI, Iowa University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Regional Representatives
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- South America: Juan Carlos CASTILLO, Universidad Católica de Chile, Chile
- Europe: Juha KLEMELÄ, Finland
- Africa: Charles PUTTERGILL, South Africa
- Oceania: Lawrence SAHA, Australia
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Program Coordinator (2023)
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Alison BIANCHI
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-2014-2018">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 2014–2018</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
President
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Clara SABBAGH, University of Haifa, Israel
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary-Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Alison BIANCHI, Iowa University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Newsletter Editor
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Charles PUTTERGILL, University of Pretoria, South Africa
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Board Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- South America: Juan Carlos CASTILLO, Universidad Católica de Chile, Chile
- Europe: Juha KLEMELÄ, Finland
- Africa: Charles PUTTERGILL, South Africa
- Oceania: Lawrence SAHA, Australia
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-2010-2014">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 2010–2014</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
President
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Guillermina JASSO, New York University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary-Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Alison BIANCHI, Iowa University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Newsletter Editor
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Charles PUTTERGILL, University of Pretoria, South Africa
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Board Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- Europe: Juha KLEMELÄ, Finland
- Latin America: Francisco Antar MARTINEZ GUZMAN, Mexico
- Middle East: Dahlia MOORE, Israel
- Asia: Deepak VERMA, India
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-2006-2010">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 2006–2010</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
President
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Cecilia RIDGEWAY, Stanford University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary-Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Robert SHELLY, Ohio University, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Board Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- Charles Bernard KINGHOMBE, Université de Kinshasa, Congo
- Dahlia MOORE, College of Management, Israel
- Indrek TART, Tallinn University, Estonia
- Deepak Kumar VERMA, India
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Newsletter Editor
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Charles PUTTERGILL, University of Pretoria, South Africa
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-2002-2006">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 2002–2006</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
President
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Tina UYS, South Africa
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary/Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Robert SHELLY, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Board Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- James COTE, Canada
- Jeylan MORTIMER, USA
- Toshio YAMAGISHI, Japan
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Newsletter Editor
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Kinga WYSIENSKA, Poland
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-1998-2002">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 1998–2002</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Chair
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Edward LAWLER, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Murray WEBSTER, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- Phyllis MOEN, USA
- Linda MOLM, USA
- Tadeusz SOZANSKI, Poland
- Toshio YAMAGISHI, Japan
- Vladimir A. YADOV, Russia
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Newsletter Editor
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Tina UYS, South Africa
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-1994-1998">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 1994–1998</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Chair
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Karen COOK, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Jeylan MORTIMER, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Dagmar KUTSAR, Estonia
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Board Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- A. JASINSKA-KANIA, Poland
- Linda MOLM, USA
- Tadeusz SOZANSKI, Poland
- Heinz-Gunter VESTER, Germany
- Toshio YAMAGISHI, Japan
- Vladimir A. YADOV, Russia
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Newsletter Editor
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Tina UYS, South Africa
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-1990-1994">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 1990–1994</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Chairman
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Mincho DRAGANOV, Bulgaria
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Secretary-Treasurer
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Karen COOK, USA
:::
:::

::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Members
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
- Carl BACKMAN, USA
- A. JASINSKA-KANIA, Poland
- Vladimir MAGUN, USSR
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

<details class="past-board-card" id="board-1988-1990">
<summary class="past-board-summary">Board 1988–1990</summary>
<div class="past-board-content">
::: {.past-board-members}
::: {.past-board-role}
Chairman
:::
::: {.past-board-names}
Mincho DRAGANOV, Bulgaria
:::
:::
</div>
</details>

:::

::: {.past-boards-toc}
<div class="past-boards-toc-title">Boards</div>
<ul>
  <li><a href="#board-2018-2022">2018–2022</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-2014-2018">2014–2018</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-2010-2014">2010–2014</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-2006-2010">2006–2010</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-2002-2006">2002–2006</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-1998-2002">1998–2002</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-1994-1998">1994–1998</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-1990-1994">1990–1994</a></li>
  <li><a href="#board-1988-1990">1988–1990</a></li>
</ul>
:::

:::

:::

<script>
document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  document.querySelectorAll('.past-boards-toc a').forEach((link) => {
    link.addEventListener('click', () => {
      const id = link.getAttribute('href')?.replace('#', '');
      const target = document.getElementById(id);
      if (target && target.tagName.toLowerCase() === 'details') {
        target.open = true;
      }
    });
  });
});
</script>
